questions.question:
다음 밑줄 친 단어의 뜻으로 가장 적절한 것은?
I love my friends. They’re very special to me.
다음 중 두 단어의 의미 관계가 나머지 셋과 다른 것은?
There 	a big tree in front of my house.
She didn’t eat dessert 	she was too full.

A : 	do you think of my new skirt?
B : It looks good on you.

A : I can’t walk. I broke my leg yesterday.
B : 	.
choices: ④ I’m sorry to hear that

questions.question:
다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
◦ It’s 	outside. You should wear a coat.
◦ He said he had a sore throat. Did he catch a 	?

다음 대화에서 A가 찾아가려는 곳의 위치로 옳은 것은?
A : Excuse me, how can I get to City Hall?
B : Go straight one block and turn right. You’ll find it
on your left.
A : Thank you.
choices: ④ go straight one block and turn right. You'll find it on your left.

questions.question:
그림으로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : What is the boy doing?
B : He is 	a bike.

다음 대화가 끝난 후 두 사람이 함께 갈 장소는?
A : Where are you going, Minsu?
B : I’m going to the school gym to play basketball.
A : Really? Can I join you?
B : Sure. Let’s go together.

다음 대화의 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : You look so happy today. What’s up?
B : 	.
A : Oh, where did you find your dog?
B : He was in the park near my house.
choices: ③ I found my missing dog

questions.question:
다음 대화의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
A : Boram, what’s your plan for this vacation?
B : I plan to take guitar lessons. How about you?
A : I’m going to visit my grandparents in Jeju-do.
다음 홍보문을 보고 알 수 없는 것은?

다음 방송의 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Hello, 	students. 	Tomorrow 	is 	Sports 	Day. 	Please
remember to wear comfortable clothes and shoes. Keep
the rules to play safely and fairly. 	Stay with your
classmates during the events. Have fun!
choices: ② 체육 대회 유의 사항 설명
④ 학교 식당 공사 일정 안내

questions.question: 다음 대화에서 A가 Nepal로 여행 가고 싶은 이유는?

White Winter Festival에 관한 다음 글의 내용과 일치하지
않는 것은?
questions.passage:
The White Winter Festival starts in the last week of
January and goes on for five days. People can enjoy ice
fishing. There is also a snowman building contest.
Musicians play live music at night.

questions.question:
다음 글에서 Elena에 대해 언급된 내용이 아닌 것은?
I’m 	Elena 	from 	France. 	I 	want 	to 	be 	a 	fashion
designer someday. I tried on a hanbok when I visited
Korea in 2020. I loved the style of hanbok. My dream
is to make such beautiful clothes in the future.
questions.passage:
I'm Elena from France. I want to be a fashion
designer someday. I tried on a hanbok when I visited
Korea in 2020. I loved the style of hanbok. My dream
is to make such beautiful clothes in the future.

questions.question:
다음 글에서 Susan이 제안한 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Susan and I walked home together yesterday. We
saw that the walls around the school looked ugly. We
wanted 	to 	make 	them 	pretty 	and 	colorful. 	Susan
suggested that we paint pictures on the walls.
questions.passage:
Susan and I walked home together yesterday. We
saw that the walls around the school looked ugly. We
wanted to make them pretty and colorful. Susan
suggested that we paint pictures on the walls.

questions.question:
그래프로 보아 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 적절한 것은?
Han-guk School students like 	movies the most.

다음 글의 흐름으로 보아 어울리지 않는 문장은?
Jiho’s father runs a small restaurant. ① He makes
amazing spaghetti. ② Jiho wants to learn how to cook
it. ③ So, he’s going to practice cooking spaghetti with
his father this week. ④ Burgers are his favorite food.
He hopes to make delicious spaghetti like his father.
choices: ② Jiho wants to learn how to cook it.
So, he's going to practice cooking spaghetti with his father this week.
④ Burgers are his favorite food.
questions.passage:
Jiho's father runs a small restaurant. ① He makes
amazing spaghetti. ② Jiho wants to learn how to cook
it. So, he's going to practice cooking spaghetti with
his father this week. ④ Burgers are his favorite food.
He hopes to make delicious spaghetti like his father.

questions.question:
밑줄 친 them이 가리키는 것으로 가장 적절한 것은?
I read the news about newly designed buses. It says
people can get on these buses more easily. The buses
have no steps and have very low floors. Even a person
in a wheelchair can use them without any help.

캠핑 시 주의해야 할 사항으로 언급되지 않은 것은?
◦ Don’t put up a tent right next to the river.
◦ Don’t feed wild animals.
◦ Don’t leave your trash behind.
choices: ① 강 바로 옆에 텐트 치지 않기
② 야생 동물에게 먹이 주지 않기

questions.question:
다음 글의 주제로 가장 적절한 것은?
Are you feeling down? Here are some tips to help you
feel better. First, go outdoors. Getting lots of sunlight
makes you feel happy. Another thing you can do is exercise.
You can forget about worries while working out.
questions.passage:
Are you feeling down? Here are some tips to help you
feel better. First, go outdoors. Getting lots of sunlight
makes you feel happy. Another thing you can do is exercise.
You can forget about worries while working out.

questions.question:
다음 글을 쓴 목적으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Hello, Mr. Brown. The school concert is coming. My
music club members are preparing for the concert. We
need a place to practice together. Can we please use
your classroom this week?
questions.passage:
Hello, Mr. Brown. The school concert is coming. My
music club members are preparing for the concert. We
need a place to practice together. Can we please use
your classroom this week?

questions.question:
다음 글의 바로 뒤에 이어질 내용으로 가장 적절한 것은?
Visiting markets is a good way to learn about the
culture 	of 	a 	country. 	You 	can 	meet 	people, 	learn
history, and taste local food. I’d like to introduce some
famous markets around the world.
choices: ④ 외국어를 배워야 하는 이유 설명
questions.passage:
Visiting markets is a good way to learn about the
culture of a country. You can meet people, learn
